body:
Title: CRA Schedule 13 2025 Employment Insurance Premiums on Self-Employment and Other Eligible Earnings.

Source:
- https://www.canada.ca/content/dam/cra-arc/formspubs/pbg/5000-s13/5000-s13-25e.pdf

CRA Schedule 13 2025:
Line 1 is the total amount from line 11 plus line 27 of the return, or zero if negative. Line 2 adds employment income from a corporation the taxpayer controls by more than 40%. Line 3 adds tax-exempt self-employment income earned on a reserve. Line 4 is net self-employment income, the total of lines 1, 2, and 3.
Line 5 sets maximum insurable earnings at $65,700. Line 6 is EI insurable earnings from box 24 of all T4 slips, or box 14 if box 24 is blank. Line 7 subtracts line 6 from line 5. Line 8 is the lesser of line 4 and line 7.
For residents of a province or territory other than Quebec, line 9 multiplies line 8 by 1.64%, to a maximum of $1,077.48, and enters the amount on lines 31217 and 42120. If total EI premiums from boxes 18 and 55 of all T4 slips are $1,077.48 or more, line 9 is zero.
For residents of Quebec, line 10 multiplies line 8 by 1.31%, to a maximum of $860.67, and enters the amount on lines 31217 and 42120. If total EI premiums from box 18 of all T4 slips are $860.67 or more, line 10 is zero.
